description: Function serves as a rate limiter for notification events.
Branch where the length of recent events exceeds the specified limit.
Branch where the length of recent events is within or equal to the specified limit.
List comprehension loop to filter timestamps based on window start time.
Return statement when recent events exceed the limit, returning False and 0.
Return statement when recent events are within the limit, returning True and the remaining limit.
Call to len() function to determine the length of recent events in the branch.
Call to len() function to calculate the remaining limit in the return statement.
